response.justification: Strong full-stack engineering background with ~15 years of varied experience, but the role demands director-level AI strategy leadership with recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products/platforms, which the resume does not show. AI exposure is limited to recent MCP/agent tooling work, and there is no evidence of cloud/AI platform strategy at scale, advising strategic customers, or thought leadership in AI.
strengths: ~15 years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Founder of an open source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
Track record of teaching, workshops, and knowledge sharing
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products/platforms
Lacks director-level IC or strategic advisory experience
No evidence of cloud platform strategy work or advising strategic customers

key_factors.factor: No strategic advisory or director-level IC experience
